meta.description: Feature comparison between original opencode and the Rust opencodeR port

opencode [project].opencodeR: opencodeR (default) — basic stdin REPL, no proper TUI yet
opencode [project].notes: REPL loop works but missing: rich TUI, project attachment, agent switching in-session

opencode serve.notes: Full implementation with TUI dashboard option

opencode attach <url>.original: Attach to a running opencode server via URL
opencode attach <url>.notes: Basic REPL works. Missing: session history replay, message viewing, TUI attach mode

opencode run <message>.original: Run one-shot prompt, output response, exit
opencode run <message>.notes: Sends prompt, returns admitted ID. Missing: actual LLM response, streaming output

opencode models [provider].original: List available models, optionally filtered by provider
opencode models [provider].notes: Server endpoints exist. No CLI subcommand to list them standalone.

opencode providers.original: Manage AI providers and credentials (list, login, logout)
opencode providers.notes: Server has GET /api/provider, PATCH /api/credential. No CLI subcommand.

opencode agent.notes: Server has GET /api/agent. No agent create or CLI management.

opencode session.notes: Server has full session API. Client creates session on connect. No list/delete CLI.

opencode import <file>.original: Import session data from JSON file or URL

opencode stats.original: Show token usage and cost statistics

opencode uninstall.original: Uninstall opencode and remove all related files

opencode web.original: Start server and open web interface

opencode pr <number>.original: Fetch PR branch and run opencode on it

sessions.original: Full CRUD + prompt, events, history, revert, interrupt, messages, context
sessions.opencodeR: All endpoints implemented with in-memory store
sessions.notes: Missing: database persistence, agent/model switching in-prompt

agents.opencodeR: GET /api/agent returns hardcoded build + plan agents
agents.notes: Missing: agent creation, agent config from filesystem

models.original: List models, model metadata with limits + costs
models.notes: Missing: provider-backed model discovery, model limits enforcement

providers.original: List, get, OAuth flow, API key management
providers.opencodeR: GET /api/provider returns hardcoded list. Connect endpoints exist but are stubs.

filesystem.original: Read files, list directories, find files by pattern
filesystem.opencodeR: Read, list, find all work with real filesystem access

integrations.original: GitHub, GitLab, custom integrations with OAuth flow
integrations.opencodeR: Integration endpoints exist with in-memory stubs. No real OAuth.

permissions.original: Request/reply permission flow with saved rules

pty.original: Create, list, resize PTY sessions + WebSocket connect for I/O
pty.opencodeR: CRUD endpoints work. WebSocket connect implemented but no real PTY process.

events.original: SSE stream of server events (connected, heartbeat, session events)
events.opencodeR: SSE endpoint streams connected event + heartbeats. No session events pushed live.

auth.original: Password-based Basic auth with config layer
auth.opencodeR: Basic auth middleware with pre-computed credential comparison

interactive_repl.notes: Stdin loop works. Missing: multi-line input, command history, tab completion

one_shot_mode.notes: --one-shot flag sends prompt and prints response

session_list.notes: No way to list sessions from client

message_history.notes: Shows messages on connect. No pagination or formatting.

prioritized_backlog.item: Server: LLM provider integration for actual prompt responses
Server: live session events via SSE stream
